zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Longland於1370年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿可布利其時，她的父親John de Longland48歲，母親Isabel Beaupré31歲。她於1385年1月20日之前與John Faraway結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年9月21日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾亞可布斯托福享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾亞可布斯托福聖 加也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of the many minor places in England called Longland(s) or Langland(s). There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname   Langlands  .

variants.name: Langland
meanings: English: topographic name from Old English lang, long ‘long’ + land ‘land’, ‘territory’.
Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Langlands
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Longlands
meanings: English, Scottish: variant of Longland with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname Langlands .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Longland was born in 1370, in Axbridge, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Longland, was 48 and her mother, Isabel Beaupré, was 31. She married John Faraway before 20 January 1385. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 21 September 1419, in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in St James' Church, Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Longland est née en 1370, à Axbridge, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Longland, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Isabel Beaupré, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Faraway avant 20 janvier 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 septembre 1419, à Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à St James' Church, Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Longlandが1370年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアクスブリッジで生まれた時，父John de Longlandは48歳，母Isabel Beaupréは31歳であった。1385年1月20日以前にJohn Farawayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年9月21日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウスト ジャムス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Longland(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 액브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Longland(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Beaupré(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1385년 1월 20일 이전 John Faraway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 재컵스타우에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 재컵스타우 스트 자메스' c후르치에 묻혔다.
